suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the iOS mission boundary so required mission-artifact bookkeeping updates, such as reassigning assertion ownership in mission `features.json`, are either explicitly exempt from the `apps/ios/`-only edit rule or handled by a separate mission-management step.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `foundation-scrutiny-fixes` review found `/Users/admin/.factory/missions/68540ffe-393c-4cd9-ae06-48bb48e3a3ef/AGENTS.md` still says iOS workers may only modify `apps/ios/`, but this fix feature explicitly needed a `features.json` edit to move `VAL-DS-007` ownership and the worker recorded that as a procedural deviation.
